events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Grove Ash whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Ora Flame dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.

memories.event: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.
Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
